fields.acceptance_criteria: 1) Graph3DView component in viewer-api/frontend/ with generic Graph3DNode/Graph3DEdge props. 2) Force-directed layout engine generalized from HypergraphView buildLayout(). 3) Camera hook (orbit, focus) extracted. 4) Mouse interaction hook (select, drag, orbit) extracted without hypergraph-specific logic. 5) Node animation + DOM positioning extracted. 6) Generic overlay renderer hook for edge/grid rendering. 7) NodeLayer DOM component extracted. 8) HypergraphView in log-viewer refactored to wrap Graph3DView and add hypergraph-specific features (search paths, nesting, decomposition, visualization state). 9) Both viewers typecheck.
fields.title: Impl: Extract generic Graph3DView component to viewer-api
